mermaidSyntax:
graph LR subgraph Screening["Screening Period
Weeks -4 to 0"] A[Informed Consent
Week -4] --> B[Eligibility Assessment] B --> C[Baseline Measurements] end C --> D{Randomization
Week 0} D -->|Treatment Arm| E[Drug X 10mg Daily] D -->|Control Arm| F[Placebo] subgraph Treatment["Treatment Period
Weeks 0-52"] E --> G[Follow-up Visits
Weeks 4, 12, 26, 52] F --> H[Follow-up Visits
Weeks 4, 12, 26, 52] G --> I[Primary Endpoint
Week 52] H --> I end subgraph Extension["Extension Period
Weeks 52-104"] I --> J[Optional Open-Label] J --> K[Safety Follow-up
Week 56] end style D fill:#f59e0b,stroke:#d97706,color:#000 style E fill:#3b82f6,stroke:#1e40af,color:#fff style F fill:#ef4444,stroke:#b91c1c,color:#fff style I fill:#10b981,stroke:#047857,color:#fff
